heading: Vacancies in electoral college
label: 4 Vacancies in electoral college
text: Each State may, by law enacted prior to election day, provide for the filling of any vacancies which may occur in its college of electors when such college meets to give its electoral vote.
notes: Amendments2022— inserted “enacted prior to election day” after “by law”.Pub. L. 117–328
amendments: Amendments2022— inserted “enacted prior to election day” after “by law”.Pub. L. 117–328
